allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const inst = new db\(':memory:'\); console.log\('real test ok'\);")
Bash(node -e "const { DatabaseSync } = require\('node:sqlite'\); const db = new DatabaseSync\(':memory:'\); console.log\('node:sqlite works!'\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"Registered: {d['user']['prenom']} {d['user']['nom']} — token present: {'token' in d}\\"\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} invoices in DB'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"{i['id']}. {i['numero']} — {i['clientNom']}\\"\) for i in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for line in lines[-30:]: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\('role', obj.get\('type', ''\)\) if role == 'user': content = obj.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\('USER:', c['text'][:500]\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\('USER:', content[:500]\) elif role == 'assistant': content = obj.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\('ASSISTANT:', c['text'][:500]\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\('ASSISTANT:', content[:500]\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for line in data[-50:]: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) t = obj.get\('type', ''\) role = obj.get\('role', ''\) if t == 'user' or role == 'user': content = obj.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\): if c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\('USER TEXT:', c['text'][:300]\) elif c.get\('type'\) == 'tool_result': print\('TOOL RESULT:', str\(c\)[:200]\) elif content: print\('USER:', str\(content\)[:300]\) elif t == 'assistant' or role == 'assistant': content = obj.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\): if c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\('ASST TEXT:', c['text'][:300]\) elif c.get\('type'\) == 'tool_use': print\('TOOL USE:', c.get\('name', ''\), str\(c.get\('input', ''\)\)[:200]\) elif content: print\('ASST:', str\(content\)[:300]\) except Exception as e: pass ")
